languages.text: The Overseer chooses his Pet and immediately dashes to it, running for {uip|Cells|ef69d99ee41d49f1bef7a6194f78dd38} cells. Allows the Overseer to dash through allies and enemies but not through obstacles. This movement doesn’t trigger attacks of opportunity if enemies are present.

traits.locale_text: The Overseer chooses his Pet and immediately dashes to it, running for {uip|Cells|ef69d99ee41d49f1bef7a6194f78dd38} cells. Allows the Overseer to dash through allies and enemies but not through obstacles. This movement doesn’t trigger attacks of opportunity if enemies are present.
